ai_summary: Here is the executive summary:  Vodafone Idea Limited has approved the grant of approximately 13.9 crore stock options and performance stock units (PSUs) to eligible employees under its VIL Scheme 2024, compliant with SEBI regulations. This substantial award includes 8.76 crore Options exercisable at Rs. 14.19 and 5.14 crore PSUs exercisable at their face value of Rs. 10. The grant represents a significant potential dilution for existing shareholders and a future overhang on the stock, particularly due to the low Rs. 10 exercise price for the PSUs.
